#install

= Instalation Guide =

In order to install ProSE you will need:

  # Download the latest version of prose [here http://code.google.com/p/prose/downloads/list]
  # Download the DevC++ [here http://www.bloodshed.net/devcpp.html]
  # Select your problem: select the folder of your problem, copy and past ProblemData and ProblemRules to the main folder
  # Compile and run.
